problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: Constructed wetland for water filtration may resolve How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
